faq_items.question: What information do I need to provide to get an accurate remodeling quote?
faq_items.answer: To receive an accurate quote, we recommend providing: room type (e.g., kitchen, bathroom), approximate square footage or room count, current condition, desired scope of work (e.g., full remodel, cosmetic update), target budget, and preferred timeline. Our quote forms will guide you to enter these details, including fields like number of fixtures for bathrooms or square footage for flooring.

faq_items.question: Is there a minimum or maximum budget required to request a quote?
faq_items.answer: No. You can request a quote for projects of various sizes. Our quote forms include a budget range so you can specify an upper limit, such as $9,000 for a bathroom remodel or $5,000 for roof repair. We’ll tailor recommendations and service options based on the budget you enter.

faq_items.question: How do I schedule a design consultation for my kitchen remodel?
faq_items.answer: From the Kitchens section, select a design consultation service and click the “Schedule Consultation” button. You’ll then choose an available date and time, including weekday evening slots, and fill in your contact information and project notes before confirming the appointment.

faq_items.question: Can I change or cancel a booked appointment?
faq_items.answer: Yes. After booking, you’ll receive a confirmation email with a link to manage your appointment. You can reschedule to another available date and time or cancel, subject to our rescheduling and cancellation policies outlined in your confirmation.

faq_items.question: How long do typical remodeling projects take?
faq_items.answer: Timelines vary by scope: many bathroom remodels take 2–4 weeks once work begins, kitchen remodels often take 4–8 weeks, and interior painting for several rooms usually takes 2–5 days. Our quote and booking forms allow you to indicate preferences such as completion within 3 months, and we’ll confirm a more precise schedule after an on-site visit.

faq_items.question: How far in advance can I schedule an appointment?
faq_items.answer: You can typically schedule design consultations and service appointments several weeks in advance. Our online scheduler only shows dates that are at least a few days out, and in some cases we require bookings at least 7 days in advance to allow time for planning and material coordination.

faq_items.question: What kind of warranties do you offer on your services?
faq_items.answer: Warranty coverage depends on the service. Many roof repair services include at least a 5-year workmanship warranty, while other services such as flooring or painting may have 1–3 year warranties. Warranty details are listed on each service page and summarized during checkout.

faq_items.question: Do roof repair services include a free inspection?
faq_items.answer: Several of our roof repair options include a free inspection, clearly labeled as such in the Roofing category filters. When you select the “Free inspection” option, the results will show only services that provide an inspection at no additional charge before work begins.

faq_items.question: How does the financing pre-qualification process work?
faq_items.answer: From the Financing page, you can click “Pre-Qualify Now” to submit a short form with your desired loan amount, term length (such as 24 months), project type, and basic personal details. Pre-qualification is a quick assessment that does not obligate you to accept an offer and typically uses a soft credit check.

faq_items.question: What loan amounts and terms are available for remodeling projects?
faq_items.answer: Available loan amounts and terms vary by lender, but many customers pre-qualify for remodeling loans between $5,000 and $50,000, with terms from 12 to 84 months. When you complete the pre-qualification form, you’ll specify the requested amount (for example, $12,000 for a remodel) and your preferred term such as 24 months.

faq_items.question: What is the Project Plan and how do I use it?
faq_items.answer: Your Project Plan is a running list of services, bundles, and add-ons you’ve selected. As you browse, you can click buttons like “Add to Project” or “Add Bundle to Project” to include items. From the My Project page, you can review pricing, edit quantities (such as square footage or number of rooms), apply promo codes, and proceed to booking or quote submission.

faq_items.question: Can I add extra services or add-ons to a bundle?
faq_items.answer: Yes. Many bundles, such as bathroom plus flooring packages, support additional add-on services like plumbing or lighting upgrades. After adding a bundle to your Project Plan, you’ll see recommended add-ons that you can include before you review or check out.

faq_items.question: How is flooring priced per square foot?
faq_items.answer: Flooring services list a price per square foot that includes basic installation labor. When adding a flooring service to your project, you’ll enter the total area (for example, 200 sq ft), and the system will calculate an estimated project cost. Additional charges may apply for subfloor repair, removal of old flooring, or specialty materials.

faq_items.question: What is the difference between basic, mid-tier, and premium paint options?
faq_items.answer: Basic paint is a cost-effective option best suited for low-traffic areas. Mid-tier (the second tier) offers improved durability, smoother coverage, and better washability—ideal for most homes. Premium paint provides top-of-the-line finishes and maximum durability. On interior painting services, you can choose the tier that best fits your needs and budget.

faq_items.question: Can I apply promo codes to my project?
faq_items.answer: Yes. On the summary or cart-like page for your Project Plan, you’ll find a promo code field where you can enter codes such as seasonal discounts. When you apply a valid code, your total will update before you proceed to review and confirm your project.

faq_items.question: How do I save inspiration ideas for later?
faq_items.answer: In the Inspiration Gallery, each idea card has a heart or “Save” icon. Click it to add the idea to your Favorites. You can filter by style, such as modern kitchens, and save multiple ideas. Access your saved items anytime from the Favorites or Saved Ideas section.

service_categories.description: Interior and exterior painting services with multiple paint quality tiers and color options.

service_categories.name: Roofing

service_categories.name: Add-On Services
service_categories.description: Lighting upgrades, plumbing add-ons, and other enhancements to complement your main project.

services.name: Kitchen Design Consultation
services.description: One-on-one kitchen design consultation to plan layouts, finishes, and appliances for a future remodel. Includes review of your space, style goals, and budget.
services.review_snippet: The designer helped us reimagine our kitchen layout and choose finishes that fit our budget.

services.name: Full Kitchen Remodel
services.description: Complete kitchen remodel including new cabinets, countertops, flooring, lighting, and layout updates. Ideal for homeowners looking for a full transformation.
services.review_snippet: They handled everything from demo to final walkthrough and kept us updated on schedule.

services.name: Full Bathroom Remodel - Standard
services.description: Standard full bathroom remodel including new tub or shower, vanity, toilet, flooring, lighting, and up to 4 fixture replacements.
services.review_snippet: The team completed our bathroom remodel on time and within our budget.

services.name: Bathroom Refresh Package
services.description: Cosmetic bathroom update focusing on fixtures, paint, lighting, and minor tile repair without moving plumbing walls.
services.review_snippet: Perfect option for updating finishes without a full gut remodel.

services.name: Laminate Flooring Installation - Classic
services.description: Durable laminate flooring installation suitable for living areas, bedrooms, and hallways. Includes basic underlayment and removal of old carpet.
services.review_snippet: Excellent value laminate with a clean, modern look and quick installation.

services.name: Hardwood Flooring Installation - Oak
services.description: Solid or engineered oak hardwood flooring with professional installation, basic trim, and finishing.
services.review_snippet: Beautiful oak hardwood that added warmth and value to our home.

services.name: Luxury Vinyl Plank Installation
services.description: Water-resistant luxury vinyl plank flooring ideal for kitchens, bathrooms, and basements.
services.review_snippet: Great option for high-traffic and moisture-prone areas.

services.name: Interior Painting - Standard Package
services.description: Interior painting for bedrooms, living rooms, hallways, and common areas. Includes basic wall prep, two coats of paint, and standard trim touch-ups.
services.review_snippet: Clean lines, no mess, and the color turned out exactly as we hoped.

services.name: Interior Painting - Premium Finish
services.description: Premium interior painting with upgraded paint for higher durability, smoother coverage, and enhanced stain resistance.
services.review_snippet: The premium finish looks incredible and stands up well to everyday wear.

services.name: Roof Repair - Essential Leak Fix
services.description: Targeted roof repair for small to medium leaks, damaged shingles, and minor flashing issues. Includes a free inspection and photo report.
services.review_snippet: They found the source of our leak quickly and completed repairs the same week.

services.name: Roof Repair - Extended Warranty
services.description: Comprehensive roof repair package covering larger problem areas, with upgraded materials and extended 10-year workmanship warranty. Includes free inspection.
services.review_snippet: Worth the peace of mind for the longer warranty and upgraded materials.

services.name: Asphalt Shingle Roof Replacement
services.description: Full asphalt shingle roof replacement including tear-off, underlayment, flashing, and disposal of old materials.
services.review_snippet: Crew completed the full replacement in just two days.

services.name: Recessed Lighting Upgrade (Per Room)
services.description: Install or upgrade recessed ceiling lights in a single room. Includes up to 4 fixtures and new dimmer switch.
services.review_snippet: The recessed lights made our living room feel brighter and more modern.

services.name: Under-Cabinet LED Lighting
services.description: Add LED under-cabinet strip or puck lights to brighten kitchen countertops. Includes dimmer and warm white color temperature.
services.review_snippet: Our kitchen workspace is much brighter without harsh overhead light.

services.name: Smart Dimmer Switch & Fixture Upgrade
services.description: Upgrade an existing light to a smart dimmer switch and compatible LED fixture, controllable by app or voice assistant.
services.review_snippet: Quick upgrade that makes it easy to control our lights from anywhere.

services.name: Plumbing Fixture Installation Add-On
services.description: Installation of up to 2 plumbing fixtures (such as faucets, showerheads, or toilets) as an add-on to a bathroom or kitchen project.
services.review_snippet: They installed our new faucets and toilet during the main remodel visit.

services.name: Post-Renovation Deep Cleaning
services.description: Thorough post-renovation cleaning service to remove dust, debris, and construction residue from newly remodeled areas.
services.review_snippet: They left our home spotless after the remodel.

inspiration_ideas.title: Sleek White Modern Kitchen with Waterfall Island

inspiration_ideas.title: Open-Concept Modern Kitchen and Dining Space
inspiration_ideas.description: An airy modern kitchen opening to the dining area, with warm wood tones, matte black hardware, and a large island for entertaining.

inspiration_ideas.title: Modern Kitchen with Statement Range Hood
inspiration_ideas.description: Modern cabinetry paired with a bold range hood, quartz counters, and under-cabinet lighting to highlight the backsplash.

inspiration_ideas.title: Minimalist Modern Kitchen with Hidden Storage
inspiration_ideas.description: Handleless cabinets, hidden pantry doors, and integrated lighting keep this modern kitchen clutter-free and streamlined.

inspiration_ideas.title: Two-Tone Modern Kitchen with Wood and White
inspiration_ideas.description: Warm wood base cabinets paired with crisp white uppers, a large island, and modern pendant lights for a balanced modern aesthetic.

inspiration_ideas.title: Spa-Like Modern Bathroom with Walk-In Shower
inspiration_ideas.description: A calming modern bathroom featuring a frameless glass shower, large-format tile, and floating vanity with integrated lighting.

inspiration_ideas.title: Compact Modern Bathroom with Bold Tile
inspiration_ideas.description: Space-efficient bathroom design with bold patterned floor tile, wall-mounted sink, and glass shower doors to keep sightlines open.

inspiration_ideas.title: Wide-Plank Wood Floors in Modern Living Room
inspiration_ideas.description: Light-toned wide-plank flooring creates a spacious feel in this modern living room with neutral furnishings.

inspiration_ideas.title: Neutral White Walls in Sunlit Living Space
inspiration_ideas.description: Soft neutral white walls paired with warm woods and simple decor to keep the focus on natural light.

inspiration_ideas.title: Modern Home Office with Built-In Storage
inspiration_ideas.description: Streamlined built-in cabinets, floating shelves, and a simple desk create an efficient modern home office.

inspiration_ideas.title: Classic White Shaker Kitchen
inspiration_ideas.description: Traditional kitchen with shaker cabinets, subway tile backsplash, and polished hardware for a timeless look.

inspiration_ideas.title: Modern Farmhouse Kitchen with Open Shelves
inspiration_ideas.description: Blending farmhouse charm and modern touches, this kitchen features open shelves, apron sink, and black fixtures.

inspiration_ideas.title: Statement Tile in Contemporary Bathroom
inspiration_ideas.description: Contemporary bathroom with a feature wall of patterned tile, freestanding tub, and wall sconces for layered lighting.

inspiration_ideas.title: Layered Lighting in Modern Kitchen
inspiration_ideas.description: Recessed cans, under-cabinet strips, and statement pendants create layered lighting and flexible moods in this modern kitchen.

bundles.name: Bathroom Remodel + Flooring Plus Bundle
bundles.description: Popular bundle pairing a full bathroom remodel with upgraded laminate or luxury vinyl plank flooring for up to 300 sq ft.

bundles.name: Premium Bathroom + Hardwood Flooring Bundle
bundles.description: Upgrade to a spa-like bathroom and oak hardwood flooring in an adjacent room for a cohesive high-end look.

bundles.name: Luxury Bathroom + Whole-Level Flooring Transformation
bundles.description: Comprehensive luxury package including a high-end bathroom remodel and new hardwood or LVP flooring across an entire level of your home.

bundles.name: Kitchen Refresh + Flooring Value Bundle

bundles.name: Kitchen + Hall Bathroom Makeover Combo

bundles.name: Whole-Home Refresh: Paint, Floors, and Lighting
bundles.description: Multi-room package including interior painting, new flooring in common areas, and key lighting upgrades for a cohesive whole-home refresh.

bundles.name: Interior Paint & Lighting Refresh Bundle
bundles.description: Bundle interior painting for up to three rooms with recessed or smart lighting upgrades to modernize your living spaces.
